- before = the materially different prior interface when one exists, as code only; otherwise use `no materially different prior interface found`
- current = the current signature or callable interface on this branch, as code only
- simplificationStrategy = combine when overlapping entrypoints should become one function because they serve the same consumer job; otherwise split, trim, rename, or stabilize
- combineWith = the sibling methods/functions that should fold into one consumer-facing function; [] when no consolidation is needed
- problem = the main caller-facing problem
- whyConfusing = 1-3 short bullets explaining why callers may misuse or misunderstand it
- consumerImpact = who calls it and why the current interface is costly or risky for them
- better = the recommended option's concrete better signature, split, or caller contract, as code only
- whyBetter = why the recommended option will be easier to extend, reuse, or understand later
- suggestions = 2-3 concrete options ordered from recommended to more invasive
- migrationNotes = practical call-site migration steps or compatibility notes
- priority = critical, high, medium, or low based on caller impact
- fixPrompt = a concise implementation prompt for simplifying this exact function interface
- summarySource must always be exactly "same-prompt-openCode"

20:   writeArtifacts,

24: import type { TReviewCompare } from "../schemas/review-range.js";
25: import { syncCheckedInViewerAssets } from "../viewer/build/sync-assets.js";
26: 
27: export type TGenerateReviewResult = TArtifactPaths & {
28:   review: TReviewDocument;
29:   config: TReviewConfig;
30: };
31: 
32: export type TGenerateReviewMode = "full" | "incremental";
33: 
34: export async function generateReview({
35:   repoPath,
36:   mode = "full",
37:   scope = "branch",
38:   config,
39:   compare,
40:   promptHint = process.env.OPENREVIEW_PROMPT_HINT ?? "",
41:   signal,
42: }: {
43:   repoPath: string;
44:   mode?: TGenerateReviewMode;
45:   scope?: TReviewScope;
46:   config?: Partial<TReviewConfig>;
47:   compare?: Partial<TReviewCompare> | null;
48:   promptHint?: string;
49:   signal?: AbortSignal;
50: }): Promise<TGenerateReviewResult> {
51:   if (scope === "repo" && mode === "incremental") {
52:     throw new Error("Whole-repo review mode does not support incremental review mode.");
53:   }
54: 
55:   const resolvedRepoPath = await resolveRepoRoot(repoPath);
56:   const outputDirName = config?.outputDirName ?? getReviewOutputDirName(scope);
57:   const baseUrl =
58:     config?.baseUrl ??
59:     (await ensureRepoOpenCodeServer({
60:       repoPath: resolvedRepoPath,
61:       outputDirName,
62:     }));
63:   const resolvedConfig = resolveReviewConfig(
64:     {
65:       ...config,
66:       baseUrl,
67:       outputDirName,
68:     },
69:     scope,
70:   );
71:   const snapshot = await collectRepoSnapshot({
72:     repoPath: resolvedRepoPath,
73:     scope,
74:     ...(compare !== undefined ? { compare } : {}),
75:   });
76:   const prompt = scope === "repo" ? buildRepoReviewPrompt({ snapshot }) : buildReviewPrompt({ snapshot });
77:   const promptText = [
78:     scope === "repo"
79:       ? `${prompt}\n\nWhole-repo mode: assess the repository's current interface posture across representative shared entrypoints and module boundaries. Do not limit findings to changed files.`
80:       : mode === "incremental"
81:         ? `${prompt}\n\nIncremental mode: prioritize recently changed architecture surfaces and interface/contract impact. Do not over-index on superficial diff hygiene.`
82:         : prompt,
83:     promptHint.trim()
84:       ? `Additional review direction:\n${promptHint.trim()}`
85:       : "",
86:   ]
87:     .filter(Boolean)
88:     .join("\n\n");
89:   const promptResult = await runStructuredReviewPrompt<TReviewDocument>({
90:     config: resolvedConfig,
91:     directory: snapshot.repoPath,
92:     prompt: promptText,
93:     schema: REVIEW_DOCUMENT_JSON_SCHEMA,
94:     ...(signal ? { signal } : {}),
95:     onSessionDebugUpdate: async (sessionDebug) => {
96:       await writeDebugArtifact({
97:         repoPath: snapshot.repoPath,
98:         config: resolvedConfig,
99:         prompt: promptText,
100:         snapshot,
101:         openCode: sessionDebug,
102:       });
103:     },
104:   });
105:   const review = ReviewDocumentSchema.parse(promptResult.structuredOutput);
106: 
107:   const artifacts = await writeArtifacts({
108:     repoPath: snapshot.repoPath,
109:     config: resolvedConfig,
110:     review,
111:     snapshot,
112:     prompt: promptText,
113:     openCode: promptResult.sessionDebug,
114:   });
115:   await syncCheckedInViewerAssets({
116:     repoPath: snapshot.repoPath,
117:     outputDirName: resolvedConfig.outputDirName,
118:   });
119: 
120:   return {
121:     ...artifacts,
122:     review,
123:     config: resolvedConfig,
124:   };
125: }

366:       [
367:         `### \`${file.path}\``,
368:         `- State: ${file.state}`,
369:         `- Module boundary: ${file.moduleBoundary}`,
370:         `- Interface summary: ${file.interfaceSummary}`,
371:         `- Branch change: ${file.branchChange}`,
372:         `- Caller impact: ${file.callerImpact}`,
373:         `- Extensibility summary: ${file.extensibilitySummary}`,
374:         `- Suggested direction: ${file.suggestedDirection}`,
375:         file.interfaceTags.length > 0
376:           ? `- Interface tags: ${file.interfaceTags.join(", ")}`
377:           : "- Interface tags: none",
378:         "- Function findings:",
379:         ...renderFunctionFindingsMarkdown(file.functionFindings),
380:       ].join("\n"),
381:     )
382:     .join("\n\n");
383: 
384:   return [
385:     `# ${review.overview.repoName}`,
386:     "",
387:     `- Project type: ${review.overview.projectType}`,
388:     `- Domain: ${review.overview.domain}`,
389:     "",
390:     "```mermaid",
391:     "flowchart LR",
392:     `  repo[\"${escapeMermaid(review.overview.repoName)}\"]:::repo`,
393:     componentNodes,
394:     changeNodes,
395:     impactedNodes,
396:     review.overview.keyModules
397:       .map((component, index) => `  repo --> component_${index}`)
398:       .join("\n"),
399:     changedEdges,
400:     impactedEdges,
401:     "  classDef repo fill:#0f172a,stroke:#38bdf8,color:#e2e8f0,stroke-width:2px;",
402:     "  classDef changed fill:#1d4ed8,stroke:#93c5fd,color:#eff6ff,stroke-width:3px;",
403:     "  classDef impacted fill:#1e293b,stroke:#f59e0b,color:#fde68a,stroke-dasharray: 5 3;",
404:     "```",
405:     "",
406:     "## Interface review summary",
407:     review.overview.reviewSummary,
408:     "",
409:     `## Changed files (${changedFiles.length})`,
410:     ...(changedFiles.length > 0
411:       ? changedFiles.map((file) => `- \`${file.path}\` — ${file.branchChange}`)
412:       : ["- None"]),
413:     "",
414:     `## Affected files (${impactedFiles.length})`,
415:     ...(impactedFiles.length > 0
416:       ? impactedFiles.map((file) => `- \`${file.path}\` — ${file.callerImpact}`)
417:       : ["- None"]),
418:     "",
419:     "## Interface patterns",
420:     ...review.overview.interfacePatterns.map((pattern) => `- ${pattern}`),
421:     "",
422:     "## Key modules and boundaries",
423:     ...review.overview.keyModules.map((component) => `- ${component}`),
424:     "",
425:     "## Function interface findings by file",
426:     fileSection,
427:     "",
428:   ].join("\n");
429: }
430: 
431: export async function writeArtifacts({
432:   repoPath,
433:   config,
434:   review,
435:   snapshot,
436:   prompt,
437:   openCode,
438: }: {
439:   repoPath: string;
440:   config: TReviewConfig;
441:   review: TReviewDocument;
442:   snapshot: TRepoSnapshot;
443:   prompt: string;
444:   openCode: TOpenCodeSessionDebug;
445: }): Promise<TArtifactPaths> {
446:   const outputDir = path.join(repoPath, config.outputDirName);
447:   const overviewPath = path.join(outputDir, "overview.md");
448:   const fileInsightsPath = path.join(outputDir, "file-insights.json");
449:   const graphPath = path.join(outputDir, "graph.json");
450:   const debugPath = path.join(outputDir, "debug.json");
451:   const mergedFiles = buildMergedFiles({ review, snapshot });
452:   const graph = buildGraph({
453:     repoName: review.overview.repoName,
454:     files: mergedFiles,
455:   });
456:   const debugArtifact = buildDebugArtifact({
457:     prompt,
458:     snapshot,
459:     openCode,
460:   });
461: 
462:   try {
463:     await fs.mkdir(outputDir, { recursive: true });
464:     await fs.writeFile(
465:       overviewPath,
466:       renderOverviewMarkdown({ review, mergedFiles }),
467:       "utf8",
468:     );
469:     await fs.writeFile(
470:       fileInsightsPath,
471:       `${JSON.stringify(mergedFiles, null, 2)}\n`,
472:       "utf8",
473:     );
474:     await fs.writeFile(
475:       graphPath,
476:       `${JSON.stringify(graph, null, 2)}\n`,
477:       "utf8",
478:     );
479:     await fs.writeFile(
480:       debugPath,
481:       `${JSON.stringify(debugArtifact, null, 2)}\n`,
482:       "utf8",
483:     );
484:   } catch (error) {
485:     throw new OutputWriteError(
486:       "Failed to write review artifacts",
487:       { outputDir },
488:       { cause: error as Error },
489:     );
490:   }
491: 
492:   return {
493:     outputDir,
494:     overviewPath,
495:     fileInsightsPath,
496:     graphPath,
497:     debugPath,
498:   };
499: }
